reviews.review_description: Overall this game isn’t too bad it’s pretty fun but i think there should be a way to attack the guards because it’s kinda annoying how they can get you every time

ok i like this game alot but add these things... multiplayer, weopons to fight the guards and add more thing to steal if you add multiplayer automatic 50000000000000000000000000000000000000000000 stars :]

Considering this game is still part of app lab and has no review yet, I completely expected this game to suck and downloaded it to see if I was correct. Turns out it's quite interesting finding all the treasures throughout the castle, few issues though...
The climbing mechanic, especially when climbing ladders, is somewhat difficult as your hand has to be held perfectly in a single position to hold something.
The guards often walk into a wall and stop working altogether a few minutes into each round.
There are several places around the castle where you can underneath the map, sending you back to the cell.
When a guard spots you I have no idea how to escape them besides climbing ladders, if there are no ladders around then I'm sent back to the cell no matter what. 
One thing I really like about the guards though is their voices, they are gentler and less deep than a knight would often be depicted in other games. I'm sure there are some out there who don't like this but I think it adds more to the game.

In conclusion, this game needs some updates and bug fixes, but it's got potential and I enjoy playing it!

It looks like for now it’s a prototype, but I think it has potential to become a great game. It needs better guard ai, to be able to use also the left hand for the UI, adding a lot of fx sounds when you interact with the objects, better lighting and the time to sunrise counter needs to be improved. And add climbing spots nearer from one another.
It would be better with multiple  on it instead of just wasting time of just stealing stuff by yourself with another person next to you and you can steal much faster
Considering this is my 2-3 game on my oculus and I found this on accident my review may not be very accurate but in my opinion this game is pretty good. 🥳
